overview: An integrative medicine practice offering multi-disciplinary care to address chronic illness, Lyme disease, pain management, women's health, and cancer care. Treatment combines conventional medicine with complementary therapies including acupuncture, naturopathic medicine, clinical nutrition, therapeutic massage, and mental health support.
highlights: Specialization in Lyme disease and tick-borne illness treatment
IV infusion therapy for chronic illness and wellness
targetAudience: Patients with chronic illness, Lyme disease, and those seeking integrative medicine approaches.
